text: A young woman with red hair walks through a misty forest at dawn
An elderly fisherman casts his line into a calm mountain lake
Aerial drone shot pulling back from a city skyline at sunset
Macro close-up of dewdrops on a spider web, shallow depth of field
A dimly lit jazz club with a single spotlight on a saxophone player
Bright midday sun cuts through tropical palm leaves
Slow motion shot of a hummingbird hovering near a hibiscus flower
Time-lapse of clouds racing over a desert mesa
Cinematic anamorphic shot, film grain, teal and orange color grade
Wes Anderson symmetrical composition, pastel palette
A barista pours steamed milk creating a heart pattern in coffee
Two children chase fireflies in a backyard at dusk
A bustling night market in Bangkok with neon signs reflected in puddles
An abandoned 1950s diner overgrown with vines
Handheld camera follows a chef through a busy restaurant kitchen, warm tungsten lighting, shallow focus pulls between faces
Wide angle establishing shot of a snowy village, dolly forward toward a single illuminated window
Golden hour light catches dust motes in an antique library, slow vertical pan reveals towering bookshelves
A red balloon floats up
Rain on a window
A single candle flickers
